title: Proposal Request for Group Life Insurance
description: The bank seeks group life insurance coverage with the following benefits: death coverage (accident or illness), Total Permanent Disability (TPD), Total Temporary Disability, Permanent Partial Disability (PPD), Critical Illness coverage, funeral expenses (member, spouse, up to 4 children), and education benefit. The scope aims to enhance employee benefits, provide financial security to beneficiaries, strengthen competitive positioning, and demonstrate corporate responsibility toward staff and families.
